ddls:
CREATE TABLE "texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the text */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the narrative text */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Genre of the narrative text */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the text */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the editor of the text */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full content of the text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the text was created */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the text */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Page count of the text */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the text (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the text was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the author was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Fiction, Poetry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text in which the character appears */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the character (e.g., Protagonist, Antagonist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the character */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the character */,
  "backstory" TEXT /* Backstory of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text associated with the theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme (e.g., Love, Betrayal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the theme */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the theme in the text */,
  "importance" INTEGER /* Importance of the theme (rating 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_themes_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "excerpts" (
  "excerpt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each excerpt */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text from which the excerpt is taken */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the text */,
  "excerpt_text" TEXT /* Content of the excerpt */,
  "chapter_number" INTEGER /* Chapter number of the excerpt */,
  "excerpt_type" TEXT /* Type of the excerpt (e.g., dialogue, description) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("excerpt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_excerpts_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text associated with the note */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who made the note */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., character, theme, plot) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the note (public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., senior, junior) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the analyst */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analyst was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the text (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was created */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of the review (e.g., professional, reader) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., magazine, website) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer (e.g., magazine, website) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was created */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of the feedback (e.g., bug, suggestion) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editors" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the editor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the editor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the editor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the editor was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
